channel.title: psychrandom python on Cactus theme example
channel.description: Recent content in psychrandom python on Cactus theme example

item.title: PsychRandom.py: A program for randomizing participants to treatment groups
item.description: In order to brush up on my Python skills, I decided to write a small utility program that randomizes participants to treatment groups for psychology experiments. Not really groundbreaking work, but hey, it might prove useful at some point. The program is called PsychRandom.py, and can be run either from a GUI or from the command line. The user specifies the number of participants in the experiment, as well as the number of treatment groups and whether or not a balanced design is required (i.
